response.global_analysis: The video is a compilation of promotional materials. Vocal audio is present only during the hololive 3rd Generation segment (00:59 - 01:51). The audio consists of a male narrator reading promotional text and the 3rd Generation members singing. I have verified the transcription against the on-screen text and audio vocalizations. No reference lyrics were provided in the JSON, so I relied on the audio waveform as the ground truth for timing and screen text for content. Timestamps are strictly tied to vocal bursts.

subtitles.english: The next stage they challenge is...

subtitles.original: #きゅるるん大作戦 ～最強アイドルに推すしかないでしょ～
subtitles.english: #Kyururun Big Mission: No Choice but to Support the Strongest Idols

subtitles.original: 「好き」と「かわいい」を詰め込んで あなたと作る大作戦！
subtitles.english: Packing in "love" and "cute," a big mission to create with you!

subtitles.original: いっぱいのこれまでと、ときめくような一瞬を！
subtitles.english: Full of everything until now, and a heart-pounding moment!

subtitles.original: どこまででも行けちゃう気がする！
subtitles.english: I feel like I can go anywhere!

subtitles.original: ちなみに作戦の内容は
subtitles.english: By the way, the details of the mission are...

subtitles.original: かわいいに満たされろ！
